title: RSU Broadcast Delay in Smart City Traffic Management
description: A stationary RSU exhibited inter-message delays up to 8.4 seconds in CAM broadcasts, exceeding the ETSI TS 103 900 threshold and resulting in loss of cooperative awareness for nearby vehicles.

stage_2.pitfall_detail: Missing or delayed CAMs with inter-message intervals exceeding 2.0 seconds

stage_3.cause_detail: Hypothesised causes linked to the network/software stack. These are hypotheses to guide monitoring.

compliance.description: Proportion of inter-message intervals within threshold

awareness_loss.description: Fault duration weighted by vehicle speed
